title: Smoky Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African-inspired dish made with smoky chicken, roasted vegetables, and a blend of spices.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven or saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrots and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the diced red peppers, tagine spice blend, salt, and black pepper.
Stir to combine, then add 1 cup of water.
Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve the chicken and vegetables hot, garnished with sesame seeds and a dollop of Greek yogurt (if using).
Serve over couscous or rice, if desired.
